leather_vest.name: Leather Vest
leather_vest.description: A simple leather vest. Offers minimal protection.

rangers_hide.name: Ranger's Hide
rangers_hide.description: Tough hide armor favored by forest rangers.

chainmail.name: Chainmail
chainmail.description: Interlocking iron rings. Heavy but effective.

desert_wrap.name: Desert Wrap
desert_wrap.description: Layered cloth and leather hardened by the desert sun.

shadow_plate.name: Shadow Plate
shadow_plate.description: Dark metal armor that absorbs light. Unnervingly cold to the touch.

guardian_armor.name: Guardian Armor
guardian_armor.description: Ancient armor forged by the same hands that made the crown. It remembers how to protect.
